statement: No surveyed commodity tool's primary docs confirm {{token}} build-time templating of rule content; ai-rulez ships a JSON schema and profiles/presets but does not document variable substitution.

evidence.quote: 33 builtin domains... content organization via domains/profiles, remote includes... JSON schema directory present — but README does not document template syntax or variable substitution.
No token templating or variable substitution... distributes Markdown verbatim.

falsifier: ai-rulez/rulesync source or docs showing a real variable-interpolation engine ({{var}}, includes-with-substitution); ai-rulez 'remote includes' may partly satisfy this and would weaken the gap.
